DEPT 1/JUDGE DESMOND: CASE RETURNED TO DEPT 1 BY PRO-TEM LEWIS LEONE DUE TO REPORTED WORDS WITH DEFENDANT. CASE REASSIGNED TO VISITING JUDGE AGUILAR.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, ZARIN AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, STEVE SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLLINS, STEVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: BAKER HOTEL, 1485 PINE STREET, #405, STAYED UNTIL OCT-01-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFENDANT COLLINS DOES NOT VACATE 1485 PINE STREET, #405 BY 10-1-96, 12 NOON, HE WILL OWE $465.00 IN RENT, 10.33 DAMAGES UP TO AND INCLUDING DATE OF JUDGEMENT AND COSTS OF SUIT.

JUDGE CHARLES AGUILAR COURT REPORTER DIANE PADILLA COURT CLERK JOYCE WEIR CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLAINTIFF PREPARED JUDGEMENT.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT COLLINS, STEVE
